The '''uplink tower''' on [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]] existed three kilometers from Ruul's [[Ruul computer complex|central computer complex]]. A large antenna, it was used to transmit data offplanet from the complex.

In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the computer facility's relay was damaged in an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attack that took the area back from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. [[Dellis Tantor]] had to string a series of [[remote relay beacon]]s from the complex to the tower in order to transmit Rebel data to the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Inquisitor (Star Destroyer)|''Inquisitor'']] in orbit.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
